title: MYTHOS
description: A fan-made Wynncraft resource pack that adds awesome-looking models to your Wynncraft items!
body:
![(MYTHOS Banner)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68a25687fdeda3abbfb96185bb57f3ff13b715fb.png)
### **Introduction**

  Hey there! \
  I'm ProbsWinter, a modeling hobbyist who plays [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/). \
I have had a great time playing on Wynncraft, but I soon realized that many items share the same models. \
  While the models were neat, the fact that higher-tiered items can have the same look as some common equipment makes them feel less special. Wouldn't it be nice if there were more variation? To change this, I started modeling, and multiple resourcepacks were created in the course of two years, all of which became the foundation of MYTHOS, which is the project you're seeing right now.

  You may notice discrepancies in the quality of models, and this is because MYTHOS is still incomplete and growing. I will try my best to get all models to be up-to-date while giving every Mythic item a distinct appearance.

  _This is a fan-made resourcepack of Wynncraft and I am not affiliated with the team running Wynncraft._
##
### **Summary** 
  MYTHOS is a work-in-progress, unofficial resourcepack made for Wynncraft. With a goal of breathing life into items that Wynncraft players all know and love, MYTHOS applies new models to many Mythics and numerous lower-tiered items. 
  
  To see examples of models added by the resourcepack, simply head to the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mythos_/settings/gallery) page of this project.

##
### **Required Mods**
- As of now, the resourcepack requires [**Variants-CIT**](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit), which is necessary for detecting item names and applying the corresponding model. Versions of the pack which use Variants-CIT have a **[VCIT]** tag in their names.
- [**CIT Resewn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) versions of the pack (marked by a **[CITR]** tag) are old and unsupported since the mod itself seems to be discontinued. 
- If the models fail to show up even after installing [**Variants-CIT**](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit), try install [**Server Pack Unlocker**](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) and place MYTHOS above the Wynncraft Pack in your _'Resource Packs...'_ page to ensure that models in this resourcepack are not overriden by models in the server resourcepack.
- It is heavily recommended (but not required) to run [**Wynntils**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynntils) with this pack, as the mod's Spell Cast Message Overlay function prevents models from not applying when spells are cast. It is also a good general QoL mod for Wynncraft.

- **Optifine is not supported.**

##
### Terms of Use
  You may not redistribute this project without my permission; nor claim ownership over this project (this includes all assets in this project). If you wish to let more know about MYTHOS, please do so using [this link](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythos_). You can neither repurpose MYTHOS in any other projects nor use MYTHOS for monetary gains unless you have clear permission from me. 
  This project may be used for content creation or be modified, with the condition that the modified project is not publicly distributed. \
Do credit me if it is used for content creation.
